subcodes.first_line: O Hassan! Upon thee be the glory of God, the Mighty, the All-Powerful. We make mention, this day, of Our friends and loved ones who were not prevented [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسن علیک بهآء الله العزیز المقتدر انا ذکرنا الیوم اولیائی و احبائی الذین ما منعتهم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @prayer for protection, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
